title: Russian-Style Charred Pork Chops
description: Tender pork chops smothered in a rich, charred tagine sauce. Perfect for a hearty dinner.
instructions: Season the pork chops with salt, black pepper, thyme, and garlic powder.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the pork chops until browned on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the pork chops to a baking sheet and bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the pork chops are cooking, heat the charred tagine sauce in the skillet over medium heat.
Add the light brown sugar to the skillet and stir to combine.
Once the pork chops are done, serve them with the charred tagine sauce spooned over the top.
